ddls:
CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "rd_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on Research and Development */,
  "administration_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on Administration */,
  "marketing_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on Marketing */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data is recorded */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial record */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the financial record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated */,
  "operational_cost" REAL /* Total operational costs */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the state */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business unit */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the financial record was created or updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "main_industries" TEXT /* Main industries in the state */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate in the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "business_unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the business unit */,
  "main_product_or_service" TEXT /* Main product or service of the business unit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the business unit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business unit */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each financial record
Amount spent on Research and Development
Reference to the state where the data is recorded
Number of employees in the state
Timestamp of when the financial record was created or updated
Region where the state is located
Contact email for inquiries about the state
Timestamp of when the state record was last updated
Unique identifier for each business unit
Contact email for inquiries about the business unit
Main product or service of the business unit
Timestamp of when the business unit record was last updated
Timestamp of when the user last logged in
